tools.name: query_minute_bars
tools.description: Full trading day of intraday OHLCV bars for one US stock (interval 3-240 min, default 3m). $0.025 USDC.

tools.name: list_tickers
tools.description: List all tickers that traded on a given date. $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: query_range
tools.description: Multi-day intraday bars for one ticker (interval 3-240 min, default 3m). $0.01/day, no day limit.

tools.name: query_batch
tools.description: Multiple tickers for one date. $0.02/ticker, no limit.

tools.name: scan_market
tools.description: Scan all US stocks on a date for custom criteria (gaps, volume, change). $0.10 USDC.

tools.name: query_daily
tools.description: Daily OHLCV bars for one ticker over a date range. $0.001/year.

tools.name: get_brief
tools.description: Full research brief: price, fundamentals, insiders, splits for one ticker. $0.25 USDC.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Company profile: name, CIK, industry, exchange, fiscal year. $0.005 USDC.

tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: Quarterly fundamentals from SEC EDGAR (revenue, EPS, margins, etc). $0.02 USDC.

tools.name: get_insiders
tools.description: Insider transactions (Form 4) from SEC EDGAR. $0.02 USDC.

tools.name: get_filings
tools.description: SEC filing index (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, proxies) for a ticker. $0.01 USDC; add sections=[risk_factors, mdna] to extract full section text from the latest 10-K/10-Q for $0.05.

tools.name: get_bars
tools.description: Resampled OHLCV bars at custom timeframes (3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 30, 60, 240 min). Derived aggregates for one ticker. $0.015 USDC per day.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Pricing and data coverage information. Free.
